{{Expand}}

{{Infobox event
| name = Trial Two
| introduced = cradle-03-blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The second trial is labeled '[[Trial Two]]'.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c13">''Blackflame'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Events]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle events]]
